overview.useShortcutHint: Use a shortcut to begin dictating into the focused application.
overview.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Start dictating to see your stats here.
overview.welcomeDesc: Your AI-powered voice dictation assistant. Use your shortcuts to start dictating.

history.noEntries: No entries yet. Use a shortcut to start dictating.
history.confirmDeleteEntryDesc: This will permanently remove the entry and its audio recording.
history.confirmClearAllDesc: This will permanently delete all {{count}} entries and their audio recordings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.launchOnLoginDesc: Start in the system tray on boot.
settings.sendContextDesc: Sends focused app and selection to the model.
settings.telemetryDesc: Technical telemetry only: no audio or dictated text. Builds without OTLP config stay local-only.
settings.toggleHint: Press to start, press again to send.
settings.pushToTalkHint: Hold to speak, release to send. Double-tap for hands-free mode.
settings.revealModeHint: How text appears in the target field.
settings.resetShortcutCaptureHint: If shortcuts stop responding, click this to reset the shortcut capture lock.
settings.restartSetupWizardHint: Walk through the setup wizard again.
settings.metaAloneUnsupported: The Windows key alone is not supported as a shortcut on Windows.
settings.hookFailedMessage: The keyboard hook failed. Check that no antivirus or security software is blocking it, or try running the app as administrator.
settings.fallbackClipboardHint: If text insertion fails, the result stays in your clipboard. All settings can be changed later.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Your AI-powered voice dictation assistant. Dictate into any app, transform selected text, and go hands-free — all with a single shortcut.
onboarding.welcomePoint1: Works in any app — email, chat, docs, code
onboarding.welcomePoint2: Select text and speak to transform it
onboarding.upgradeShortcutChange: The default shortcut changed in this version. There is no separate default toggle-to-talk key anymore: hands-free mode now starts by double-tapping the default push-to-talk shortcut.
onboarding.environmentTitle: Do you work next to other people?
onboarding.environmentDesc: We'll tailor the experience based on your environment.
onboarding.environmentMixedDesc: Mix of private and public spaces
onboarding.whisperTitle: You can whisper around other people
onboarding.whisperDesc: Ditado works even when you whisper. Your voice is captured and processed locally — no one nearby needs to hear a thing.
onboarding.whisperTestimonial1: I use it in the office even with my team around — just whisper and it works perfectly.
onboarding.whisperTestimonial2: Didn't believe it until I tried it. Works flawlessly even in open offices.
onboarding.featureWhisper: Whisper it — works even softly, even with people nearby
onboarding.featureSelectTransform: Select & transform — select text, speak to translate or rewrite it
onboarding.featureSelfCorrect: Self-correct naturally — fix yourself mid-sentence, Ditado knows the difference
onboarding.featureHandsFree: Hands-free mode — double-tap the shortcut to keep recording without holding
onboarding.connectApiDesc: Ditado uses OpenRouter to access AI models. Enter your API key to get started.
onboarding.makeItYoursDesc: Choose the look and language that feels right for you.
onboarding.micTestDesc: Speak naturally and watch the bars respond. Your built-in mic works well, but a wired headset is ideal for whispering.
onboarding.microphoneAccessDesc: Ditado needs mic permission to capture your voice.
onboarding.micSeeingBars: Do you see the bars move while you speak?
onboarding.micQuickTip: A wired headset or desk mic also works well for whispering
onboarding.shortcutTestTitle: Press the shortcut to test it out
onboarding.shortcutTestDesc: We recommend Ctrl + Win on Windows, or Ctrl + ⌘ on Mac — at the bottom-left of the keyboard.
onboarding.shortcutTestQuestion: Do the keys highlight while pressing?
onboarding.tryPushToTalkDesc: Hold Ctrl + Win while you speak, release to insert. Works in any app — email, chat, docs, anywhere.
onboarding.trySelectTransform: Select text, speak to transform it
onboarding.trySelectTransformDesc: Select any text, press the shortcut, and speak what you want. Try: "make this more formal" or "translate to Portuguese".
onboarding.trySelectTransformInstruction: Select the highlighted text on the right, then use your shortcut
onboarding.tryHandsFreeDesc: Double-tap the shortcut quickly to start recording without holding it down. Tap once more when you're done. Perfect for long dictations.
onboarding.doubleTapTip: Double-tap the shortcut to activate — tap once to stop
onboarding.allSetDesc: Ditado lives in the system tray. Use your shortcut to dictate into any focused field anywhere on your computer.
onboarding.suggestedPhrasesPtt: Schedule a meeting for next Tuesday at 2 PM with a video call link.
onboarding.suggestedPhrasesToggle: Rewrite this more formally: thanks for reaching out, we will be in touch soon.
onboarding.holdAndSpeak: Click the field on the right, then hold {{hotkey}} and speak
onboarding.pressToStartStop: Select the text on the right, then press {{hotkey}} to start
onboarding.textWillAppear: Your dictated text will appear here…
onboarding.whisperAppsDesc: Works in chat, docs, email, browsers, and editors — anywhere you can type.
onboarding.apiKeyStoredSecurely: Your API key is stored securely and never leaves your device.
onboarding.appearanceAppliedInstantly: Your preferences are applied instantly across all Ditado windows.
onboarding.environmentPrivateTip: Full voice dictation is perfect for you.
onboarding.selectTransformTip: Try: "Translate this to Spanish" or "Make this more formal"
onboarding.handsFreeFinishTip: Dictate a long brain-dump, then tap the shortcut to finish
onboarding.readyDesc: You're ready to dictate anywhere. Just hold your shortcut and speak.
onboarding.testimonial1Quote: I write 3× faster now. Just whisper and it appears.
onboarding.testimonial2Quote: Ditado transformed how I respond to emails. It's invisible.
onboarding.selectTransformOriginalText: thanks for reaching out, we will be in touch soon
onboarding.demoContactMessage: Hey, is voice dictation working for you?
onboarding.selectTransformPlaceholder: Use your shortcut then speak what to do…
onboarding.selectFirstHint: Select the highlighted text above first, then use your shortcut and speak what to do.
